name: Andre Sales Command Center — Comeketo Catering production system
next_move: Consider as reference implementation for consciousness-for-AI build. Adding Interoception/Affect and Social-Cognition-Turned-Inward modules would push it from 8-of-10 to full consciousness-for-AI spec (Open Questions 9.7).
blockers: Vocabulary cleanup must not break operational UI senses of 'anchor' and 'comparator' already in production use
Multi-tenancy / scaling questions open (currently single-user: Andre + Rodrigo viewing)
live_band: Deployed: Close CRM ingestion → oracle layer → live state → supabase backend → render deployment → docker containerization. Decision Intent and Primary Comparator are first-class UI dropdowns. Algebra Contributions panel surfaces sore-thumb variables with signed weights. Typed abstention at decision layer (Andre as final human approver). Currently Jake's day-job top priority over FPGA build.
notes: The framework's first commercial deployment — philosophically coherent + computationally demonstrated + commercially validated. Running 8 of the 10 consciousness-for-AI modules at smaller scale: Unified World Model (lattice_catalog + live_pipeline + live_close_crm), Self-Model (andre_profile + andre_kpis), Attention-as-Selection (Decision Intent + Primary Comparator), Predictive Processing (close probability + decay risk), Temporal Continuity (activity_log + live_tasks), Metacognition (ROC scoring, certify-with-oracle), Action Selection + Narrative Closure (best next action + 'what it beat'), Global Availability (action queue / pipeline as shared workspaces). Missing: Interoception/Affect, Social Cognition Turned Inward. UI principles derived here (Open Question 9.8) are candidates to generalize as framework design standards.

phases.title: Harden the live deployment
phases.goal: Lock the currently-deployed system so Andre and Rodrigo can lean on it daily without Jake babysitting.

deliverables.title: Vocabulary cleanup that doesn't break the UI

tasks.title: Grep every 'anchor' and 'comparator' usage in the codebase and tag UI vs internal
Decide which UI labels stay (Decision Intent, Primary Comparator) and document as locked
Rename internal-only senses with a single PR; leave UI strings untouched
Have Rodrigo click through pipeline + action queue post-rename

deliverables.title: Basic observability so failures surface before Andre notices

tasks.title: Add a 'Close ingest stalled >2h' alert to Slack or email
Pipe oracle-layer exceptions to a single rolling log Jake checks each morning
Add a /health endpoint and external uptime ping

deliverables.title: Tight feedback loop with Andre on the live UI

tasks.title: Schedule a 20-min weekly screenshare with Andre to watch him use the queue
Keep a friction-log doc — every hesitation/click-confusion gets one line
Each week, ship fixes for the top 3 friction items

phases.title: Add the missing 2 of 10 modules
phases.goal: Push from 8/10 to full consciousness-for-AI spec by adding Interoception/Affect and Social-Cognition-Turned-Inward.

deliverables.title: Interoception/Affect layer for the system itself

tasks.title: List internal signals worth sensing (queue length, stale leads, oracle disagreement rate)
Compute a single affect score per refresh and store it
Surface affect as a small system-state pill in the UI header

deliverables.title: Social-Cognition-Turned-Inward — the system reasoning about its own model of Andre

tasks.title: Write the explicit model: what the system thinks Andre will do with each action
Log predicted-vs-actual when Andre commits/rejects an action
Feed mismatches back into the andre_profile weighting
Map each of the 10 modules to its concrete code path in the repo
Capture one screenshot or log snippet per module as evidence
Cross-reference into Secretary so it inherits the pattern

phases.title: Extract UI principles as framework design standards
phases.goal: Promote the comparator-as-UI pattern from a Comeketo accident into a reusable standard for every future framework-native product.

deliverables.title: Documented pattern library from Open Question 9.8

tasks.title: List the 5-7 UI patterns that earned their keep here (Decision Intent dropdown, Algebra Contributions panel, etc.)
Write a one-pager per pattern: when to use, when not to, what it replaces
Drop the library into knowledge/ and tag for Secretary's reference

deliverables.title: Resolve the multi-tenancy / scaling open question

tasks.title: Sketch the three plausible futures (stay single-tenant, sell-as-service, white-label)
Score each against North Stars (especially day-job priority)
Either commit to one path or formally abstain (Θ) with the reason logged
